prompt: Create a high-fashion runway portrait of a young East Asian woman with fair skin, delicate features, and long voluminous wavy black hair walking toward the camera with a calm confident expression and direct eye contact. Frame her from mid-thigh to just above the head in a vertical 9:16 composition, centered slightly left, with shallow depth of field and a dark blurred runway audience in the background. She wears a black deep-V spaghetti-strap couture bodice covered in ornate silver floral embroidery and beadwork, paired with black trousers or skirt panels, a wide black leather waist belt with a round metal buckle, and cutout detailing at the waist. Include exactly 4 visible jewelry elements: two dangling crystal earrings, one black choker with small hanging beads, and one small strap brooch or jewel near the left shoulder. She carries or holds one black feathery garment or stole at her right side. Lighting should be dramatic runway lighting with soft highlights on the face and collarbones, muted charcoal background, realistic skin texture, glossy lips, subtle smoky eye makeup, cinematic editorial fashion photography, ultra-detailed fabric embroidery, natural motion in the hair as if from a runway breeze. Use black, silver, charcoal gray, and soft skin tones. No text, no logo, no watermark.
promptEn: Create a high-fashion runway portrait of a young East Asian woman with fair skin, delicate features, and long voluminous wavy black hair walking toward the camera with a calm confident expression and direct eye contact. Frame her from mid-thigh to just above the head in a vertical 9:16 composition, centered slightly left, with shallow depth of field and a dark blurred runway audience in the background. She wears a black deep-V spaghetti-strap couture bodice covered in ornate silver floral embroidery and beadwork, paired with black trousers or skirt panels, a wide black leather waist belt with a round metal buckle, and cutout detailing at the waist. Include exactly 4 visible jewelry elements: two dangling crystal earrings, one black choker with small hanging beads, and one small strap brooch or jewel near the left shoulder. She carries or holds one black feathery garment or stole at her right side. Lighting should be dramatic runway lighting with soft highlights on the face and collarbones, muted charcoal background, realistic skin texture, glossy lips, subtle smoky eye makeup, cinematic editorial fashion photography, ultra-detailed fabric embroidery, natural motion in the hair as if from a runway breeze. Use black, silver, charcoal gray, and soft skin tones. No text, no logo, no watermark.
promptZh: 创作一张高级时装 T 台肖像，主角为 一位皮肤白皙、五官精致、留着一头浓密黑色长卷发的年轻东亚女性，她正带着冷静自信的表情走向镜头，并与镜头进行直接的眼神交流。采用 9:16 的竖版构图，将其置于画面中左侧，截取范围从大腿中部到头部上方，背景为浅景深且模糊的深色 T 台观众。她身着 一件黑色深 V 吊带高定紧身胸衣，上面覆盖着华丽的银色花卉刺绣和珠饰，搭配黑色长裤或裙片，腰间系着一条带有圆形金属扣的宽版黑色皮带，腰部有镂空细节。画面中需包含 4 个清晰可见的珠宝元素：两只垂坠水晶耳环、一条带有小挂珠的黑色颈圈，以及左肩附近的一枚小饰针或珠宝。她右手拿着或挽着一件黑色羽毛服饰或披肩。灯光应为戏剧性的 T 台灯光，面部和锁骨处有柔和的高光，背景为柔和的炭灰色，呈现真实的皮肤质感、亮面唇妆、精致的烟熏眼妆，具有电影感的编辑时尚摄影风格，超精细的织物刺绣，头发呈现出 T 台微风吹拂下的自然动感。使用 黑色、银色、炭灰色和柔和的肤色。无文字，无 Logo，无水印。
